# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { get } from '@vercel/edge-config';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

interface EdgeConfigData {
  API_KEY?: string;
  DB_URL?: string;
  FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI?: boolean;
  FEATURE_FLAG_BETA_FEATURES?: boolean;
  FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS?: boolean;
  MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE?: number;
  CACHE_TTL_SECONDS?: number;
}

const DEFAULT_CONFIG: EdgeConfigData = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI: false,
  FEATURE_FLAG_BETA_FEATURES: false,
  FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS: true,
  MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE: 100,
  CACHE_TTL_SECONDS: 300,
};

async function getConfigValue<K extends keyof EdgeConfigData>(
  key: K
): Promise<EdgeConfigData[K]> {
  try {
    if (process.env.EDGE_CONFIG) {
      const value = await get<EdgeConfigData[K]>(key);
      if (value !== undefined) {
        return value;
      }
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(`Error fetching ${key} from Edge Config:`, error);
  }
  return DEFAULT_CONFIG[key];
}

async function getAllConfig(): Promise<EdgeConfigData> {
  try {
    if (process.env.EDGE_CONFIG) {
      const edgeConfig = await get<EdgeConfigData>('config');
      if (edgeConfig) {
        return { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG, ...edgeConfig };
      }
      
      const apiKey = await get<string>('API_KEY');
      const dbUrl = await get<string>('DB_URL');
      const featureNewUI = await get<boolean>('FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI');
      const featureBeta = await get<boolean>('FEATURE_FLAG_BETA_FEATURES');
      const featureAnalytics = await get<boolean>('FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS');
      const maxRequests = await get<number>('MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE');
      const cacheTTL = await get<number>('CACHE_TTL_SECONDS');

      return {
        API_KEY: apiKey ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.API_KEY,
        DB_URL: dbUrl ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.DB_URL,
        FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI: featureNewUI ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI,
        FEATURE_FLAG_BETA_FEATURES: featureBeta ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAG_BETA_FEATURES,
        FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS: featureAnalytics ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS,
        MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE: maxRequests ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE,
        CACHE_TTL_SECONDS: cacheTTL ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.CACHE_TTL_SECONDS,
      };
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching config from Edge Config:', error);
  }
  return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
}

export default async function handler(req: NextRequest) {
  const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
  const action = searchParams.get('action') || 'getAll';
  const key = searchParams.get('key');

  try {
    if (action === 'get' && key) {
      const value = await getConfigValue(key as keyof EdgeConfigData);
      return NextResponse.json({
        success: true,
        key,
        value,
        source: process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ? 'edge-config' : 'default',
      });
    }

    if (action === 'getAll') {
      const config = await getAllConfig();
      return NextResponse.json({
        success: true,
        config: {
          ...config,
          API_KEY: config.API_KEY ? '***' + config.API_KEY.slice(-4) : undefined,
          DB_URL: config.DB_URL ? config.DB_URL.replace(/:([^:@]+)@/, ':***@') : undefined,
        },
        fullConfig: config,
        source: process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ? 'edge-config' : 'default',
        edgeConfigConnected: !!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG,
      });
    }

    if (action === 'health') {
      const config = await getAllConfig();
      return NextResponse.json({
        success: true,
        status: 'healthy',
        edgeConfigConnected: !!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
        features: {
          newUI: config.FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI,
          betaFeatures: config.FEATURE_FLAG_BETA_FEATURES,
          analytics: config.FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS,
        },
      });
    }

    if (action === 'validate') {
      const config = await getAllConfig();
      const validations = {
        apiKeyPresent: !!config.API_KEY,
        dbUrlPresent: !!config.DB_URL,
        dbUrlValid: config.DB_URL?.startsWith('postgresql://') || config.DB_URL?.startsWith('postgres://'),
        maxRequestsValid: typeof config.MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE === 'number' && config.MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE > 0,
        cacheTTLValid: typeof config.CACHE_TTL_SECONDS === 'number' && config.CACHE_TTL_SECONDS >= 0,
      };

      const allValid = Object.values(validations).every(v => v === true);

      return NextResponse.json({
        success: true,
        valid: allValid,
        validations,
        edgeConfigConnected: !!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG,
      });
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      success: false,
      error: 'Invalid action. Use: getAll, get, health, or validate',
    }, { status: 400 });

  } catch (error) {
    return NextResponse.json({
      success: false,
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error',
      source: 'default',
    }, { status: 500 });
  }
}
